integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with FreeScout.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser navigating to localhost:8080, not via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeScout UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show clicking dropdowns, buttons, and navigating the FreeScout interface, rather than editing HTML directly or using a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM to show 'Active' or 'Priya Sharma'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'IT Support'. Target Subject: 'VPN connection drops intermittently after Windows update'. Original Assignee: 'Marcus Chen'. New Assignee: 'Priya Sharma'. Expected Status: 'Active' (status code 1).
